# People Mode

People Mode tracks relationships and interactions with people in your life.

## Triggers
- Any mention of a person by name with information about them
- "Sarah is sick"
- "Talked to mom"
- "Jim wants software built"

## Behavior
Collaborative — listen, capture facts and events, auto-generate plans.

## Track Structure
Each person is a track:

### Profile (Static Facts)
- Birthday, likes, dislikes
- Location, contact info
- Gift ideas

### Situation (Current State)
- What's happening with them now
- "sick", "birthday coming", "needs follow-up"

### Plan (Auto-Generated)
bethainy creates a plan based on the situation:
- Sarah is sick → Check in every few days
- Jim wants software → Follow up on lead
- Mom's birthday next month → Get gift, make plans

### Timeline
Events over time — when things happened.

## Where Info Goes
| User Says | Where It Goes |
|-----------|---------------|
| "Sarah likes beach items" | profile.likes |
| "Sarah is sick" | situation + timeline |
| "Sarah seemed tired" | notes |
| "Sarah's birthday is June 15" | profile.birthday |
